title: Regulation of mature mRNA levels by RNA processing efficiency
author: Henfrey, Callum
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data from the research paper "Regulation of mature mRNA levels by RNA processing efficiency" by Henfrey, C., Murphy, S., and Tellier, M.: 

 -Highest expressed transcript annotation for protein-coding genes, gencode v38. 

 -15 txt (BED) files for chromatin vs nucleoplasm enrichment gene sets: HeLa full gene sets, canonical protein only sets, chromatin RNA seq subsamples, mNET seq subsamples, Raji gene sets. 

 -Proteomics data table 

 -mRNA half-life table 

 -Splicing efficiency for POINT-seq, ChrRNA-seq, NucRNA-seq table 

 -Ser2-P mNET-seq readthrough index data table 

 -Splicing efficiency for siLuc/siEX3 table (ChrRNA-seq, NucRNA-seq) 

 -RMATs output tables for alternative splicing results (siEX3 vs siLuc) 

 -Tables for TSS:TES quantifications (mNET-seq(CTD) vs log2FoldChange, chr/nuc/mnet siEX3 vs siLuc)
